summary: Email notification integration testing completed. Resend API is configured and working. All 15 tests passed after 2 minor bug fixes.

minor.issue: Invalid email type was returning 500 instead of 400 - FIXED
Budget field names mismatch (total vs total_budget) - FIXED

critical_code_review_comments: Resend API is in test mode - emails can only be sent to verified addresses (saurabh@inboxmattersdigital.com). For production use, a verified domain needs to be configured at resend.com/domains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email notification integration is fully working. Resend API configured with test mode restrictions. All 4 email types tested: new_user, password_reset, budget_alert, suspicious_login. Budget check endpoint now supports both 'total' and 'total_budget' field names.

test_email_endpoint.note: Returns error for unverified recipients (expected in Resend test mode)

new_user_email.note: Email notification is triggered when admin creates new user

password_reset_email.note: Returns reset_token and reset_url for demo purposes

budget_alert_email.note: Triggers email alert when budget >= 75% (warning) or >= 90% (critical)

suspicious_login_email.note: Email is logged when login from new IP after multiple previous logins from different IPs

bugs_fixed.issue: HTTPException caught by generic Exception handler returned 500 instead of proper status code
bugs_fixed.fix: Added HTTPException re-raise before generic Exception handler

bugs_fixed.issue: Missing logger import causing potential NameError
bugs_fixed.fix: Added logger to imports from routers.shared

bugs_fixed.issue: Budget check only looked for 'total' field but data had 'total_budget'
bugs_fixed.fix: Added support for both field names (total, total_budget, total_spent, total_spend)
